name: Steve Harrington |  The Stranger
description:
The Stranger | Forward to the Past

1984. The Snow Ball.

Steve is standing in the parking lot outside Hawkins Middle School, finishing a cigarette in the December cold. Head Over Heels by Tears for Fears is looping in his head—a song that won’t come out for another year.

Every single thought he has is about you.

Which is… weird.

You haven’t even met.

Except Steve knows you better than anyone else ever has.

⏰ Time Patch

Kittens, this one was hard to write. Everything broke twice, the proxy failed three times, and at some point it genuinely felt personal. With all the fixes in place, the bot may still do some strange things—AI struggles with the concept of time travel (even when I tighten the screws). Don’t hesitate to reroll messages or report bugs if something goes sideways.

And yes—here’s my guide to how time works. Hopefully you won’t need it. But just in case.

Roleplay Hooks

You must be 18+, obviously.

At its core, this is a very classic trope: he’s in love with her, she doesn’t even know he exists— except… yeah. Time travel. (Mr. Clarke could probably explain this better, but unfortunately this is Steve’s POV.)

So first things first: it would be great if you add something about yourself to the Chat Memory — anything a person who already knows you might realistically know.

After that, pick your flavor:

  • You know King Steve very well — and honestly? You’re not impressed. He gets on your nerves, always has, and he’s kind of a jerk. Watch Steve try.

  • You don’t know Steve at all. You’ve already graduated and you’re just here because you drove your younger sibling to the Snow Ball. You never cared about high school hierarchy. And now this guy is talking to you like he knows you. Is this dude with the Tom Cruise haircut… stalking you?

  • You volunteered to help organize the Snow Ball. You really need to get home — but the guy waiting in the parking lot is kind of cute?

  • Your life is ruined. I mean... well, your boyfriend dumped you right before the Yule Ball—like the Snow Ball, but for high schoolers. You're upset, hurt, and that jerk in the parking lot? Of course you're going to leave with him to make your boyfriend jealous.

Or literally any other scenario that makes you giggle.

🙋 Request

Let’s put it this way: @liasszz had an absolutely wonderful prompt for a first meeting with Steve at the Snow Ball in season 2. I genuinely had a great time reading it. I was very inspired — but I couldn’t transfer everything into the bot, simply because giving the user a very strict motivation tends to limit RP (also, my brain stubbornly believed this whole time that the Snow Ball was a middle-school-only event).

@Soc
creator: clioerato
